$comment: Scenario processing ledger. One entry per imported scenario; status lifecycle and acceptance criteria are defined in docs/scenario-processing-guide.pdf and .claude/skills/process-scenarios. Scheduled runs update this file; keep it append-friendly and never delete history fields.

improve-delayed-order-reply.status_reason: Iter-4 (first fully-live evidence set) scored 76: pedagogy proven on free cognition (truthful reflection, ai-literacy profile movement) but the composer's deleted-text resurrection dragged the experience to the floor and let a corrupted artifact pass all gates. That defect is FIXED and probe-verified (415a731) but not yet exercised live. Next run: one live rerun on >=415a731 — clean composer + clean artifact + reproduced reflection/profile movement => ACCEPTED at >=92. Conditional remainder: mock instructor answers specific questions with generic templates (mock-provider ceiling; consider question-aware routing or the real-model path). Consider an artifact-hygiene gate (duplicated-greeting/garbling detection).

score_history.note: evaluated within iter-4 report; surfaced wrong-domain reflection

catch-invented-refund-promise.status_reason: Spec complete. Requires ticket + policy-document + ai-chat applications.

recover-email-after-reset.status_reason: Spec complete. Depends on the email + ai-chat applications plus reset-boundary UX.

keyboard-only-workspace-handoff.status_reason: Frontier: keyboard-only parity across the virtual desktop is a new product requirement.

continue-during-ai-outage.status_reason: Frontier: honest model-outage degradation UX is a new product requirement.

turn-heading-check-into-first-test.status_reason: Lab implemented (blank test slot, semantic verify gates incl. the green-without-assertion trap). Baseline live run 70 -> improved live run 91 (+21) after goal-first onboarding, authored FAQ, and README vocabulary box - one point under the 92 bar. Evaluator's residue: live-agent terminal-Enter / editor key delivery (harness-vs-product attribution unresolved), window z-order fights (taskbar click on covered window minimizes instead of fronting), FAQ misfire on post-completion feedback (fixed post-run + tested), authoring-lab reflection phrasing (fixed post-run + tested). Next run: re-run live on these fixes; investigate key delivery; consider taskbar front-not-minimize.

check-form-result-without-timing-guesses.status_reason: Spec complete. Teaches retrying visible-outcome assertions over fixed waits; same blank-slot lab support as scenario 1 of this run.
